name: nestjs-context
description: Shared AsyncLocalStorage context for NestJS — carries user/tenant/traceId across the request and the ecosystem.
author: Davi Carvalho <davi@goflip.ai>

scripts.version-packages: changeset version && node scripts/sync-version.mjs && biome check --write .
scripts.release: node scripts/sync-version.mjs --check && pnpm --filter './packages/*' build && changeset publish
